lever: de-delegate to nx's exact numpy matrix iteration in-process (S = max(C*(A.T@S@A), I) on fnx's native to_numpy_array) instead of a per-call fnx->nx conversion + dispatched nx call
notes: Byte-identical: same column-normalized adjacency matrix, same np.allclose(atol=tolerance) convergence, same ExceededMaxIterations contract, same float/dict/dict-of-dicts return shapes. Faster because fnx's COO to_numpy_array beats nx's and the fnx->nx graph rebuild is gone. 25 simrank pytest pass; py_compile OK. Pure-Python, no Rust rebuild.
